diff:
--- src/io/reader/query.rs
+++ replace <impl Iterator for Query<'_, '_, R>>::next -> Option<Self::Item> with None
@@ -41,27 +41,17 @@
 
 impl<R> Iterator for Query<'_, '_, R>
 where
     R: bgzf::io::BufRead + bgzf::io::Seek,
 {
     type Item = io::Result<Record>;
 
     fn next(&mut self) -> Option<Self::Item> {
-        match next_record(
-            &mut self.reader,
-            &mut self.record,
-            self.header,
-            &self.reference_sequence_name,
-            self.interval,
-        ) {
-            Ok(0) => None,
-            Ok(_) => Some(Ok(self.record.clone())),
-            Err(e) => Some(Err(e)),
-        }
+        None /* ~ changed by cargo-mutants ~ */
     }
 }
 
 pub(crate) fn intersects(
     header: &Header,
     record: &Record,
     reference_sequence_name: &[u8],
     region_interval: Interval,
name: src/io/reader/query.rs:49:9: replace <impl Iterator for Query<'_, '_, R>>::next -> Option<Self::Item> with None

diff:
--- src/io/reader/query.rs
+++ replace <impl Iterator for Query<'_, '_, R>>::next -> Option<Self::Item> with Some(Default::default())
@@ -41,27 +41,17 @@
 
 impl<R> Iterator for Query<'_, '_, R>
 where
     R: bgzf::io::BufRead + bgzf::io::Seek,
 {
     type Item = io::Result<Record>;
 
     fn next(&mut self) -> Option<Self::Item> {
-        match next_record(
-            &mut self.reader,
-            &mut self.record,
-            self.header,
-            &self.reference_sequence_name,
-            self.interval,
-        ) {
-            Ok(0) => None,
-            Ok(_) => Some(Ok(self.record.clone())),
-            Err(e) => Some(Err(e)),
-        }
+        Some(Default::default()) /* ~ changed by cargo-mutants ~ */
     }
 }
 
 pub(crate) fn intersects(
     header: &Header,
     record: &Record,
     reference_sequence_name: &[u8],
     region_interval: Interval,

diff:
--- src/record/info/field/value.rs
+++ replace parse_value -> io::Result<Value<'_>> with Ok(Default::default())
@@ -2,31 +2,17 @@
 
 use crate::{
     header::record::value::map::info::{Number, Type},
     io::reader::record_buf::value::percent_decode,
     variant::record::info::field::{value::Array, Value},
 };
 
 pub(super) fn parse_value(src: &str, number: Number, ty: Type) -> io::Result<Value<'_>> {
-    match (number, ty) {
-        (Number::Count(0), Type::Flag) => parse_flag_value(src),
-        (Number::Count(0), _) | (_, Type::Flag) => Err(io::Error::new(
-            io::ErrorKind::InvalidData,
-            "invalid number for type",
-        )),
-        (Number::Count(1), Type::Integer) => parse_integer_value(src),
-        (Number::Count(1), Type::Float) => parse_float_value(src),
-        (Number::Count(1), Type::Character) => parse_character_value(src),
-        (Number::Count(1), Type::String) => parse_string_value(src),
-        (_, Type::Integer) => parse_integer_array_value(src),
-        (_, Type::Float) => parse_float_array_value(src),
-        (_, Type::Character) => parse_character_array_value(src),
-        (_, Type::String) => parse_string_array_value(src),
-    }
+    Ok(Default::default()) /* ~ changed by cargo-mutants ~ */
 }
 
 fn parse_integer_value(src: &str) -> io::Result<Value<'_>> {
     src.parse()
         .map(Value::Integer)
         .map_err(|e| io::Error::new(io::ErrorKind::InvalidData, e))
 }
